title: AI Vaporwave Nostalgia
description: Applies a nostalgic 80s/90s vaporwave aesthetic with neon grid and VHS scanlines.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a 1980s vaporwave aesthetic art piece. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, and framing. Use a vibrant neon color palette dominated by hot pink, cyan, magenta, and deep purple. Incorporate classic vaporwave elements like a glowing wireframe 3D grid, retro-futuristic grid sunset, Greek statues, tropical palms, and a low-fidelity analog VHS glitch overlay with subtle scanlines.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, natural lighting, realistic colors, monochrome, high realism, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. synthwave grid, purple night sky...
